callGraph.callee:
arrangement_order_rules
            .iter()
            .map(|x| x.column_index) // the required column idx in this position
            .filter_map(|x| arrange_join_key_indices.iter().position(|y| *y == x)) // the position of the item in join keys
            .map(|x| stream_join_key_indices[x]).collect_vec

arrangement_order_rules
            .iter()
            .map(|x| x.column_index) // the required column idx in this position
            .filter_map(|x| arrange_join_key_indices.iter().position(|y| *y == x)).map

MaterializeExecutor::for_test(
            source,
            memory_state_store,
            table_id,
            arrangement_col_arrange_rules(),
            column_ids,
            Arc::new(AtomicU64::new(0)),
            ConflictBehavior::NoCheck,
        )
        .await.boxed

pb
            .slots
            .iter()
            .map(|s| DefineSlot {
                kind: match s.kind {
                    1 => DefineSlotKind::Prev,
                    2 => DefineSlotKind::Next,
                    3 => DefineSlotKind::RunningFirst,
                    4 => DefineSlotKind::RunningLast,
                    _ => DefineSlotKind::SelfCol,
                },
                vars: s.vars.clone(),
                col_idx: s.col_idx as usize,
                offset: s.offset as usize,
            }).collect

anyhow::anyhow!(
                                "MATCH_RECOGNIZE requires append-only input but received a {:?} record",
                                op
                            ).into

ReceiverExecutor::new(
                self.actor_context,
                fragment_id,
                self.upstream_fragment_id,
                input,
                self.local_barrier_manager,
                self.executor_stats,
                barrier_rx,
            ).boxed

MergeExecutor::new(
                self.actor_context,
                fragment_id,
                self.upstream_fragment_id,
                inputs,
                self.local_barrier_manager,
                self.executor_stats,
                barrier_rx,
            ).boxed

inputs
                .into_iter()
                .enumerate()
                .map(|(idx, input)| LocalInput::new(input, ActorId::new(idx as u32)).boxed_input()).collect

try_join_all([untouched, old].into_iter().map(async |upstream_actor_id| {
                new_input(
                    &barrier_test_env.local_barrier_manager,
                    metrics.clone(),
                    actor_id,
                    fragment_id,
                    &helper_make_local_actor(upstream_actor_id),
                    upstream_fragment_id,
                    actor_ctx.config.clone(),
                )
                .await
            }))
            .await.unwrap

MergeExecutor::new(
            actor_ctx,
            fragment_id,
            upstream_fragment_id,
            upstream,
            barrier_test_env.local_barrier_manager.clone(),
            metrics.clone(),
            barrier_rx,
        )
        .boxed().execute

MergeExecutor::new(
            actor_ctx,
            fragment_id,
            upstream_fragment_id,
            upstream,
            barrier_test_env.local_barrier_manager.clone(),
            metrics.clone(),
            barrier_rx,
        ).boxed
anyhow!("updating vnode bitmap in place is not supported").into
